fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-defined identifier for the cache entry.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A human-readable explanation of the entry's content.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the entry.

fields.name: hitCount
fields.description: The number of times this entry has been retrieved.

fields.name: cacheAge
fields.description: Duration since the cache entry was last updated.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Empty-state look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the empty-state placeholder.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Eviction policy
overridableConfigKeys.description: How entries are evicted when the cache fills: least-recently-used, least-frequently-used, first-in-first-out, or TTL-only (never evict early).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max cache entries
overridableConfigKeys.description: Hard cap on cached entries before eviction. 0 = unlimited.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Serve stale while revalidating
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true, serve stale entries to consumers while a background refresh fetches fresh data. Reduces latency at the cost of brief staleness.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the data table rendered by this atom.

overridableConfigKeys.label: TTL (seconds)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Cache entry time-to-live before it goes stale. Default 5 minutes. Shorter = fresher/real-time data; longer = stable/long-lived caching.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: expiration, time to live, cache duration, freshness, real-time (short) vs long-lived (long)
